blocks.text:
To: Barbara Ward
Cc: Deborah Gordon, Brenda Rodriguez

That was quick, thank you. The three names you sent are exactly the right people, and Deborah Gordon will reach out to each of them directly to find a half hour. If it is easier on your side, we are glad to come to you and see all three in one afternoon.

The rebate file came through as well, and Brenda Rodriguez has already begun reconciling it against the invoice data. One thing we noticed on a first pass: a handful of the largest accounts carry allowances that do not appear on the standard price sheets, so we will want to understand how those were agreed. Nothing to act on yet; I flag it only so that it is on the record for {{fact:f:E-2009-004.client}} as we go.

We now have most of what we need to give the realization picture a proper first look. Once Brenda Rodriguez has the rebate reconciliation settled and Deborah Gordon has had the first of those conversations, we will pull together a short read for you. I am keeping the request log current, and everything outstanding on the Garza, Leblanc and Porter side comes down to the interviews now.
